textPlain: Ok nice clickbaiting, post your 3x speed up part and we will talk

Something tells me they are calculating utilization in a non-standard way. While I have no doubt there is room for clever pipelining of data, to say you cut out all memory transfer overhead sounds ridiculous.If they did, Zuckerberg will cut them a $5+ billion check today.
There's no explanation as to how they achieved that speed up :( it would have been if they also wrote a post on that
Sounds like some basic plumbing that an LLM should be able to do.
> That story’s for another post, but first, here’s the recipe that got us to near-100%.From the article - it states that speed up is part of next post.
yeah, just feels like an ad for daft...
